title: Nightstand Nook Revival
logline: Transform bedroom clutter into a serene, organized space using repurposed plastic bottles.
visual_style: clean motion-comic grounded in real room photos

scenes.purpose: Introduce the problem: a cluttered nightstand with potential waste.
scenes.narration: Is your nightstand a chaotic collection of everyday items?
scenes.image_prompt: A cluttered nightstand in a bedroom, with various items scattered, a cardboard box, and empty plastic bottles visible. Clean motion-comic style, grounded in real room photos.

scenes.purpose: Highlight the empty plastic bottles as the raw material for transformation.
scenes.narration: Don't toss those empty plastic bottles! They're hidden gems.
scenes.image_prompt: Three large, empty plastic water bottles leaning against a white wall on a wooden floor, clean motion-comic style, grounded in real room photos.

scenes.purpose: Show the simple DIY process of repurposing the bottles.
scenes.narration: With a few simple cuts, transform them into stylish organizers.
scenes.image_prompt: Hands cutting a large plastic water bottle, with other bottles already cut into various shapes for organization. Clean motion-comic style, grounded in real room photos, warm lighting.

scenes.purpose: Present the organized nightstand, showcasing the repurposed bottles in use.
scenes.narration: From clutter to calm, your nightstand can be a serene space.
scenes.image_prompt: A beautifully organized nightstand with repurposed plastic bottle organizers holding small items like pens, jewelry, and remote controls. Clean motion-comic style, grounded in real room photos, warm and inviting atmosphere.

scenes.purpose: Conclude with a call to action and the benefit of repurposing.
scenes.narration: Reduce waste, organize your life. Give your bottles a second life!
scenes.image_prompt: A close-up of a repurposed plastic bottle organizer on a nightstand, holding a small plant or a few neatly arranged items, with a soft, warm glow. Clean motion-comic style, grounded in real room photos, peaceful and inventive.
